data.title: AerSale® Supports Central Asia Cargo Growth with Boeing 757 Freighter Lease to Stratos Freight
data.description: A Boeing 757 freighter has been leased by AerSale to Stratos Freight, enhancing cargo capacity and connectivity along important routes in Central Asia, Europe, and the Middle East. This move aims to strengthen operations and increase the efficiency of transporting goods in the region.

data.title: Alpha Tau Announces First-Ever Oral Presentation of Alpha DaRT® Pancreatic Cancer Data at Digestive Disease Week (DDW) 2026
data.description: In Jerusalem on March 31, 2026, Alpha Tau Medical Ltd. shared news that their alpha-radiation cancer therapy, Alpha DaRT®, had its abstract accepted for an oral presentation at Digestive Disease Week (DDW) 2026. This global gastroenterology conference will showcase results from two clinical trials conducted in Jerusalem on patients with pancreatic cancer. This event is significant as it is the first time that findings from Alpha DaRT in pancreatic cancer patients have been chosen for a presentation at a prominent international conference. Alpha Tau Medical Ltd. trades on Nasdaq under the tickers DRTS and DRTSW.

data.title: T3 Defense Reports Increased Commercial Activity Across Subsidiaries, Reflecting Rising Demand for Defense Technologies
data.description: The company is experiencing an increase in customer engagements and requests for proposals, indicating a strong pipeline as it transitions into the execution phase. This surge highlights a growing interest in the company's offerings, with a significant rise in the number of interactions with customers and potential projects. This trend underscores the company's positive outlook as it moves forward with executing its plans.

data.title: CRML Confirms Outstanding 2.96% TREO and HREO Refined Concentrate, Yielding ~40% Increase in Historical Metallurgical Test Work Results at Tanbreez
data.description: On March 31, 2026, Critical Metals Corp. (Nasdaq: CRML) disclosed that the metallurgical test findings from 2016 by AMTEC / ALS were effectively reproduced in the recent 2025 testing conducted at Fremantle Metallurgy labs in Perth, Western Australia, overseen by independent consultant Professor Tony Tang. The review utilized a matching ore sample from the initial 2016 Tanbreez research, showcasing continuity in results across the years.

data.title: 61% of Workers Would Trade Better Amenities for Fresher Air at Work, GPS Air Survey Finds
data.description: In Charlotte, a recent study by GPS Air, a top indoor air quality solutions provider, reveals that as return-to-office guidelines change, employees are increasingly focused on the comfort and management of their workplace. The research indicates that indoor air quality and physical comfort play a crucial role in shaping employees' perceptions of the in-person experience and determining if it justifies the commute. This underscores the significance of creating a comfortable and well-managed indoor environment.

data.title: U.S. Outdoor Lighting Expands AmeriLume™ Line, Strengthening its Complete Portfolio of Outdoor Solutions
data.description: A company based in Palmdale, California, has announced the expansion of its AmeriLume™ lighting fixture line. U.S. Outdoor Lighting has broadened its range, further enhancing its collection of outdoor lighting solutions.

data.title: These Analysts Slash Their Forecasts On Phreesia Following Q4 Results
data.description: Phreesia, Inc. (NYSE: PHR) released its fourth-quarter financial results, which were a mixed bag. The company reported earnings of 2 cents per share for the quarter, falling short of the expected 7 cents per share. Despite this, Phreesia saw a 16% year-over-year increase in sales, reaching $127.07 million, exceeding the anticipated $126.62 million. The quarter saw an average of 4,658 healthcare service clients, marking a 7% growth from the previous year. However, Phreesia revised its fiscal 2027 sales forecast to $510–$520 million, down from the previous estimate of $545–$559 million. The reason cited for this adjustment was a lack of clarity on spending by pharma clients and weaker commitments for the latter part of the year. The company also highlighted reaching milestones such as achieving positive GAAP net income ($2.3 million) and surpassing $100 million in Adjusted EBITDA and $50 million in free cash flow. For more details, refer to Benzinga.com.

data.title: BarmeniaGothaer Modernizes Front-to-Back Investment Platform with Bloomberg and Clearwater Analytics
data.description: Bloomberg and Clearwater Analytics have revealed that BarmeniaGothaer Asset Management AG, a leading insurance asset manager in Germany overseeing over 50 billion euros in assets, has integrated Bloomberg's buy-side solutions. Additionally, the company has opted for Clearwater Analytics as its middle- and back-office management system, covering accounting and data management functions. These steps mark the completion of BarmeniaGothaer's front-to-back investment process enhancement.

data.title: Daylit Launches AI Agents for Accounts Receivable, Bringing Autonomous Collections and Real-Time Cash Intelligence to Finance Teams
data.description: A new AI agents platform for accounts receivable (AR) has been introduced by Daylit in Boston. This platform aims to help finance teams speed up collections and utilize receivables to enhance working capital performance. So far, early users of this platform have seen a nearly 3x increase in collections on high-risk accounts. Furthermore, manual follow-up work has been reduced by over 40 hours per week, leading to a reduction in AR operating costs by more than 75%. Impressively, these users have attained email reply rates of around 50%, which is more than triple the industry average.

data.title: UKG and KPMG: Nearly 40% of Employers Suffer Millions of Dollars in Preventable Losses Annually Due to Global Payroll Errors
data.description: In Lowell, Massachusetts, a recent report by leading global AI platform UKG and advisory firm KPMG LLP highlights the inefficiencies in global payroll systems. Employee pay can account for 40%-60% of operating expenses in large organizations, yet many systems are fragmented, under-resourced, and poorly governed. This leads to significant waste and potential fraud, costing businesses millions annually. The report, based on a survey of over 300 companies, sheds light on the dire need for improved payroll management to mitigate these financial risks.

data.title: GCH Technologies Launches Modernized U.S. Short Code Registry to Support Evolving Business Messaging
data.description: GCH Technologies has unveiled the new U.S. Short Code Registry, which became active under GCH as CTIA's strategic partner starting on January 1, 2026. This updated registry enhances the infrastructure for short code messaging and accommodates the increasing intricacy of corporate communications. The Short Code Registry functions as a centralized system maintaining information on available, reserved, and registered short codes, managed by CTIA, the prominent wireless industry organization.

data.title: Connie Awarded One of Only Nine ASTP/ONC Pilot Grants to Support Electronic Consent Management for Behavioral Health Patients
data.description: In West Hartford, Connecticut, Connie, the state-designated Health Information Exchange (HIE), shared the news that it has secured the Behavioral Health Interoperability Pilot Grant. This grant aims to facilitate better care coordination among providers for patients receiving behavioral health treatment. By introducing an electronic consent management solution for substance use disorder (SUD) encounter and clinical data, Connie will work on diminishing barriers to seamless healthcare. This initiative is part of statewide efforts supported by the grant to enhance the exchange of information.

data.title: Sevii Redefines Cybersecurity at RSAC 2026, Winning Multiple Global InfoSec Awards for Autonomous Defense & Remediation
data.description: The first Level 5 Autonomous Platform in the industry was acknowledged in four key categories during the RSAC Conference 2026 in San Francisco on March 31, 2026. Sevii, a top player in Autonomous Defense and Remediation (ADR), supported by Agentic AI Cyber Warrior agents, is delighted to report this achievement.

data.title: Patrick Bell Named Director of Pet Placement Initiatives at PetSmart Charities
data.description: Patrick Bell, a well-established retail leader at PetSmart, has transitioned to the role of director of pet placement initiatives at PetSmart Charities in Phoenix. This move aims to enhance the organization's efforts in strengthening the relationship between pets and families. The announcement was made on March 31, 2026, as PetSmart continues its mission to support pets and their well-being. Bell's extensive experience in the pet retail sector is expected to contribute significantly to the charity's initiatives.

data.title: UpCodes Launches AI-Native Specifications Solution to Address Growing Compliance Complexity in U.S. Construction
data.description: A new workflow has been introduced that links building regulations directly to project specifications, facilitating early risk identification and minimizing expensive rework. The launch of UpCodes Specifications by UpCodes in AUSTIN, Texas on March 31, 2026, showcases an AI-native solution aimed at improving efficiency. This innovative approach aims to streamline the process and optimize outcomes, potentially resulting in significant cost savings for project teams.

data.title: Andesite Achieves FedRAMP High Authorized, Bringing Human-AI SOC to Federal Civilian Agencies
data.description: The company Andesite will be implementing its Human-AI Security Operations Center (SOC) system to government agencies for crucial cyber defense purposes. In a recent announcement on March 31, 2026, Andesite disclosed attaining Federal Risk and Authorization Management Program (FedRAMP) Authorized status.
